medical_history.chief_complaint: Vomiting undigested food of 3 months duration and recurrent chest infection as well as failure to thrive
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Symptoms started around the age of 6 months. Diagnosis was confirmed by barium swallow. Family history of achalasia with six members affected.
medical_history.family_history: Six members of the same family had achalasia. Symptoms started around the age of 6 months in all affected members.

physical_examination.general_examination: No abnormalities apart from failure to thrive (weight 6.6 kg).

laboratory_examinations.findings: Normal results and no DNA variants that could contribute to the phenotype were identified in the AAAS gene. The result does not exclude AAAS variants as variants outside of the analyzed region or variants not detectable by sequencing might be present.
0.3 µg/dl and 60 min after ACTH stimulation was 12.2 µg/dl (normal 6.2–19.4 µg/dl)

radiographic_examinations.findings: Normal emptying of the esophagus with no evidence of gastroesophageal reflux
